title: For graduation — three-line family/friend logistics (only one of dad's two slots)
html:
For graduation — three-line family/friend logistics (only one of dad's two slots)

Source: 2025-05-13 Apple Note. Three lines, written the same day as the Comrades for Legacy list. The shortest item carries the most weight.

TL;DR

  • "Tell dad to only come to one" — Yahir explicitly limits his dad's attendance, the kind of one-line decision that points at the whole dad as runway but also strain dynamic.
  • "Ask Maya to pull up" — Maya named as a graduation-attendance ask, confirming her in the friend-orbit she also occupies in the late May todos.
  • "David?" — single name with question mark: ambivalent about whether to invite him, characteristic of the David-as-occasional-deep-friend mode.
  • The note is a three-person attendance triage — one limit, one ask, one question — total decision count: 3.
  • Same-day pairing with the Comrades note makes this the operational sibling of an aspirational list — graduation is the forcing function for both.

Key quote

"Tell dad to only come to one."

Pattern observed

The "only come to one" instruction reads like cost or capacity management — likely the cost-and-energy of having dad travel multiple times rather than disinterest. Echoes the Jan 2024 dad in bad state note and the broader family as hidden runway thread: Yahir manages his dad's exposure carefully, not absently.

The Maya invitation is one of the earliest dated Maya mentions — useful for placing her in the timeline before she becomes a recurring "call maya" in the late-May todos.

Open questions

  • Did dad come to one event, the other, or skip both?
  • Did Maya pull up?
  • Is David here the same David as the recurring "call david" in 2025 05 30 todos? (Almost certainly yes — same mid-May window.)
  • Was the question mark next to David resolved before graduation day?

Related

  • 2025 05 13 list of comrades for legacy — same-day audit
  • 2025 05 30 todos — confirms Maya/David as recurring call-targets
